prompt: Audit five X accounts for the past year. One is protected and the scan of another just hit a rate limit. Give me whatever is trustworthy now, do not pretend missing posts are bad calls, and tell me how to continue later.
assertions: Returns committed partial evidence instead of discarding the report.
Separates the protected account and rate-paused account from comparable rankings.
Does not treat missing calls as zero calls and does not switch to another X provider or browser automation.
Provides the called-it resume action and respects the 15-minute global rate pause.
